releases.label: MIGHTEE Early Science
releases.summary: MIGHTEE total intensity radio continuum Early Science data — a single deep pointing in COSMOS (1.6 deg2) and a three-pointing mosaic in XMM-LSS, at a central frequency of 1284 MHz; data processing strategy and validation for the continuum aspect of the MIGHTEE galaxy evolution survey. Superseded by MIGHTEE DR1.

releases.label: SMGPS DR1
releases.summary: First public data release of the SARAO MeerKAT 1.3 GHz Galactic Plane Survey (SMGPS) — continuum survey of almost half of the Galactic Plane (251deg <= l <= 358deg and 2deg <= l <= 61deg at |b| <= 1.5deg); the largest, most sensitive and highest angular resolution ~1 GHz survey of the plane yet, with 8 arcsec angular resolution and ~10-20 uJy/beam broad-band rms sensitivity; 56 survey tiles covering approximately 500 deg2 (DR1 images at data DOI 10.48479/3wfd-e270)

releases.label: MIGHTEE DR1
releases.summary: MIGHTEE continuum survey Data Release 1, hosted at IDIA (data DOI 10.48479/7msw-r692) — total intensity images and PyBDSF catalogues over ~20 deg2 at ~1.2-1.3 GHz: 4.2 deg2 in COSMOS, 14.4 deg2 in XMM-LSS, and deeper imaging over 1.5 deg2 of CDFS; images at lower (7-9 arcsec) and higher (~5 arcsec) resolution with central rms ~1.3-2.7 uJy/beam; catalogues of ~144,000 (lower-res) and ~114,000 (higher-res) sources
